screens.name: CRM Intake Control
screens.primary_goal: Understand which opportunities can safely enter project control.
screens.primary_next_action: Open readiness review for the highest-risk opportunity.

management_loop.signal: Missing intake fields, unrealistic dates, feasibility warning, or duplicate opportunity.
management_loop.action: Request data, run demand/capacity check, reserve capacity, create draft, defer, reject, or accept risk.
management_loop.preview: Draft/reservation preview shows stages, role demand, dates, and capacity impact.
management_loop.result: Linked project draft or decision, refreshed intake projection, and audit id.

screens.name: Capacity Feasibility Control
screens.primary_goal: Decide whether promised dates are feasible before authorization.
screens.primary_next_action: Preview capacity reservation or request schedule change.

management_loop.signal: Role shortage, overload period, missing demand estimate, or accepted-risk expiry.
management_loop.action: Reserve capacity, adjust demand assumptions, request missing scope, or accept feasibility risk.
management_loop.preview: Before/after load buckets and opportunity/project draft impact.
management_loop.result: Feasibility decision, reservation readback, refreshed resource load, and audit id.

screens.name: Contract Authorization Control
screens.primary_goal: Convert qualified opportunity into accountable project commitment.

management_loop.signal: Missing contract artifact, missing key role, expired feasibility, or commercial/delivery risk.
management_loop.action: Create active project, assign key roles, link authorization artifact, create startup tasks, or flag risk.
management_loop.preview: Template version, initial stages, generated tasks, role assignments, linked opportunity, and capacity assumptions.
management_loop.result: Active project, startup task ids, linked opportunity, and audit id.

screens.name: Project Startup Control
screens.primary_goal: Prepare authorized project for controlled execution.
screens.primary_next_action: Generate or refresh startup plan from template.

management_loop.signal: Missing roles, infeasible dates, resource overload, KPI target missing, or baseline not ready.
management_loop.action: Generate stage tasks, assign/reserve resources, adjust dates, create risk task, approve baseline, or request input.
management_loop.preview: Before/after WBS, generated tasks, dates, resource load, and baseline draft.
management_loop.result: Startup checklist, canonical tasks, reservations, KPI targets, baseline draft, and audit id.

screens.name: Project Gantt Planner
screens.primary_goal: Plan and replan project work with MS Project-like planner ergonomics.
screens.primary_next_action: Resolve selected schedule warning or create the next planned task.

management_loop.signal: Dependency loop, date conflict, critical path slip, baseline drift, resource overload, or stage blocker.
management_loop.action: Create task, edit dates/work/progress, indent/outdent, create dependency, capture baseline, or open related control surface.
management_loop.preview: Dependency, baseline, broad date shift, and conflict-resolution preview with affected projections.
management_loop.result: API-backed WBS/timeline readback, related-surface refresh, and audit id.

screens.name: Briefing Readiness Control
screens.primary_goal: Move from vague input to approved brief without losing assumptions.
screens.primary_next_action: Request or assign the most critical missing input.

management_loop.signal: Missing source data, unresolved requirement, expired client decision, or blocked approval.
management_loop.action: Request source data, create follow-up task, create approval request, assign owner, mark blocker, or approve gate.
management_loop.preview: Approval/blocker preview shows affected next stage and unresolved requirements.
management_loop.result: Briefing state, approval status, created tasks, and audit id.

screens.name: Concept Stage Control
screens.primary_goal: Produce and approve concept package with controlled rework.
screens.primary_next_action: Approve artifact or create governed rework from the active signal.

management_loop.signal: Late concept package, rejected artifact, quality conflict, overdue rework, or resource overload.
management_loop.action: Create rework task, approve/reject artifact, escalate quality conflict, open Gantt, adjust plan, or request client decision.
management_loop.preview: Artifact rejection and plan adjustment preview show affected tasks and stage gate.
management_loop.result: Artifact status, corrective action or rework task, stage gate state, and audit id.

screens.name: Design Development And Estimate Control
screens.primary_goal: Drive developed design and estimate work to approved package.
screens.primary_next_action: Create estimate or review task for the blocking deviation.

management_loop.signal: Estimate missing, visualization blocker, resource overload, approval blocked, or cost/margin deviation.
management_loop.action: Reassign specialist, split/shift work, create estimate task, create review task, approve/reject deliverable, or escalate blocker.
management_loop.preview: Reassign/split/shift and approval previews show schedule/resource/KPI impact.
management_loop.result: Estimate/package state, workload readback, refreshed control signals, and audit id.

screens.name: Production Delivery Control
screens.primary_goal: Keep production work moving through tasks, reviews, quality checks, and approvals.
screens.primary_next_action: Resolve blocking task or request approval.

management_loop.signal: Overdue task, failed quality checklist, missing approval, blocked dependency, or final estimate missing.
management_loop.action: Create/reassign task, mark rework, open Gantt and adjust dependency, resolve overload, request approval, or escalate quality issue.
management_loop.preview: Dependency, reassign, and rework previews show downstream project/resource impact.
management_loop.result: Task/package/quality readback, refreshed My Work/Kanban/Gantt, and audit id.

screens.name: My Work Control
screens.primary_goal: Execute assigned work with clear blockers and review path.
screens.primary_next_action: Update selected task to the next allowed status or raise blocker.

management_loop.signal: Overdue task, blocked task, review requested, missing input, or dependency conflict.
management_loop.action: Start task, complete task, request review, add blocker, comment, or open linked Gantt/project.
management_loop.preview: Material status changes show affected projection and review consequence.
management_loop.result: Task status/comment/blocker readback, related surface refresh, and audit id.

screens.name: Parallel Package Control
screens.primary_goal: Coordinate discipline packages without breaking the main project plan.
screens.primary_next_action: Assign package owner or preview dependency adjustment.

management_loop.signal: Package dependency conflict, missing discipline lead, integration blocker, quality issue, or resource overload.
management_loop.action: Create package tasks, adjust dependencies, assign/reassign lead, approve/reject package, or escalate blocker.
management_loop.preview: Dependency and package-owner previews show affected main-stage tasks.
management_loop.result: Package state, dependency readback, Gantt/project refresh, and audit id.

screens.name: Closure Control
screens.primary_goal: Close the project only with traceable delivery, approval, and final metrics.
screens.primary_next_action: Preview project closure or resolve top closure blocker.

management_loop.signal: Open critical task, missing final approval, admin blocker, final KPI missing, or snapshot warning.
management_loop.action: Create final rework task, capture final KPI, close project, archive project, or accept closure risk.
management_loop.preview: Closure snapshot preview with immutable facts and open risks.
management_loop.result: Closed snapshot id, closed portfolio link, closure status, and audit id.

screens.name: Closed Portfolio Retrospective
screens.primary_goal: Turn closed-project evidence into process and template improvement.
screens.primary_next_action: Preview template/process improvement from selected insight.

management_loop.signal: Recurring delay, recurring overload, quality trend, KPI drift, or template weakness.
management_loop.action: Create retrospective action, apply template improvement, send for review, or mark insight handled.
management_loop.preview: Future-template impact preview confirms active history is not silently rewritten.
management_loop.result: Handled insight, future template version, refreshed retrospective projection, and audit id.

screens.name: Resource Load Control
screens.primary_goal: Detect and resolve capacity conflicts across stages.

management_loop.signal: Resource overload, role shortage, reservation conflict, or accepted-overload expiry.
management_loop.action: Shift work, split work, reassign work, reserve capacity, or accept overload with reason.
management_loop.preview: Before/after load buckets, affected assignments/reservations, and remaining overload.
management_loop.result: Refreshed load read model, affected project/schedule refresh, and audit id.

screens.name: KPI Deviation Control
screens.primary_goal: Convert KPI deviations into traceable management actions.
screens.primary_next_action: Create corrective action or accept risk with reason.

management_loop.signal: KPI threshold breach, severity escalation, stale explanation, or unhandled deviation.
management_loop.action: Create corrective task, request explanation, escalate, accept deviation, or update future KPI recommendation.
management_loop.preview: Action preview shows target entity, owner, due date, expected handling state, and consequence.
management_loop.result: Handled signal, corrective action or accepted risk, refreshed KPI/portfolio projection, and audit id.

screens.name: Portfolio Control
screens.primary_goal: Govern active portfolio deviations from one prioritized management plane.
screens.primary_next_action: Execute the highest-severity recommended action or accept risk.

management_loop.signal: Schedule, resource, KPI, lifecycle, quality, or financial/economic deviation.
management_loop.action: Create corrective action, open Gantt, resolve resource overload, escalate, accept risk, or request explanation.
management_loop.preview: Portfolio action preview shows affected projects, owners, severity, expected result, and related refresh targets.
management_loop.result: Signal handling state, action execution, related project/schedule/resource refresh, and audit id.

screens.name: Action Audit Control
screens.primary_goal: Verify traceability of management actions and projection refresh.
screens.primary_next_action: Open source surface or copied evidence link.

management_loop.signal: Action result, denial, validation failure, or projection refresh evidence is available.
management_loop.action: Inspect source signal/entity, open source/target, copy evidence link, or export permitted evidence.
management_loop.preview: No business mutation; evidence visibility is permission-filtered before display.
management_loop.result: Actor, permission decision, command, source signal, before/after, result, timestamp, and audit id.

screens.name: Tenant Configuration Control
screens.managed_object: RoleTemplates, StageTemplates, ArtifactTemplates, KpiThresholds, ActionDefinitions, SavedViews
screens.primary_goal: Configure lifecycle and control surfaces safely without code changes.

management_loop.signal: Validation blocker, incompatible field/action, stale draft, or affected active-object count.
management_loop.action: Validate draft, preview impact, publish version, import/export package, or disable action.
management_loop.preview: Affected screens/entities, active-history policy, future-template effect, and rollback/restore path.
management_loop.result: Versioned config, affected runtime surface readback, and audit id.

screens.name: Integration Import Control
screens.primary_goal: Bring external data into canonical KISS PM operation safely.

management_loop.signal: Payload validation issue, mapping conflict, rate-limit, retryable failure, or idempotency replay.
management_loop.action: Preview import, apply import, repair mapping, retry safe failure, or inspect diagnostics.
management_loop.preview: Create/update/skip/error counts, canonical refs, mappings, conflicts, and idempotency key.
management_loop.result: Canonical opportunity/project/task readback, ExternalMapping, import batch, and audit id.
